diagrams.title: Seven Bridges of Königsberg
diagrams.description: Original problem showing 4 land masses (A,B,C,D) connected by 7 bridges
diagrams.purpose: Illustrate why Euler path is impossible - all 4 vertices have odd degree (3,3,3,3)

diagrams.title: Eulerian vs Semi-Eulerian Graph Degrees
diagrams.description: Comparison of degree conditions for Eulerian paths and circuits
diagrams.purpose: Visual memory of degree conditions for Euler graphs classification

diagrams.title: Fleury's Algorithm Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step decision process for choosing edges in Fleury's algorithm
elements: If bridge with alternatives, choose other edge
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the bridge avoidance rule in Fleury's algorithm
